title: Fiery Syrian Chorizo Kebabs
description: Indulge in the rich flavors of Syria with these citrusy and gooey chorizo kebabs, infused with the smoky essence of binchotan charcoal and ayurvedic rajasic friendly spices.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat, using binchotan charcoal for a smoky flavor.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, sumac, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced chorizo to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chorizo onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chorizo is cooked through and slightly charred.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley and a side of tangy tzatziki sauce.
Let the kebabs rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Garnish with additional sumac and paprika, if desired.
Consider serving with a side of warm pita bread or crunchy vegetables.
